Monitored sponge #7
Goby far down, can see not moving though. Current took dye plumes so not clear puffs. Also dye was shooting out of the syringe quickly.
Fish flicking tail. Might be mad.
This is monitored sponge #1. Not pumping strongly. Dive was low visibility.  Hard to tell if dye movement is from ejection or any current because pump is so weak.
Monitored sponge #12 Goby a bit far down but can see tail not moving
Fish a bit far from camera but can tell its not moving. Dye puffs run together a lot

Third fish vid is best, the first two it swims away from camera
Third fiss vid is best, in the first two, its a bit far down the tube so less clear
This is monitored sponge #2. Not pumping strongly.  Since sponge not pumping, not real sponge rate to be seen. Video demonstrates lack of pumping though.

This is monitored sponge #4 but in a different osculum than for SwimPump sponge 5. Video is of mated pair . Sponge not pumping strongly.  Since sponge not pumping, not real sponge rate to be seen. Video demonstrates lack of pumping though.
